name: paper-trail
description: Where finished knowledge lives and what to consult before deciding. Invoke when substantial work concludes (feature built, bug root-caused, research finished, architecture decided) to file its documentation; before designing or briefing architecture (consult decision records first); when creating a module (seed its docs); or when the user says 'document this', 'update the docs', or asks where something is documented. Encodes: one canonical home per piece of knowledge; a root context.md as index-with-takeaways updated in the same pass; module-level CONTEXT.md/USAGE.md as the primary sources (in-module, docs/<module>/ mirror, or central docs/ — a declared layout profile); decision records consulted before new architecture.
